Video.summary: Chris tests a new welder on Project Spartan's roll cage while Eric inspects the motor.
Video.title: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Image.alt: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Video.summary: Chris and Eric battle the truly insane rust in Project Spartan's '69 M715 Kaiser Jeep cab.
Video.title: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Image.alt: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are tackling Project Spartan axles and turbocharging the Polaris UTV for off-road adventures.
Video.title: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Image.alt: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Video.summary: The guys install some drivetrain upgrades on their CTS-V, and paint some custom stripes on the 72 Chevelle.
Video.title: Caddy Drivetrain and Chevelle Stripes

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys take their souped-up Cadillac CTS-V for a spin.
Video.title: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Image.alt: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Video.summary: The guys start converting a Toyota 4Runner into a self-sustaining off road expedition vehicle.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 1: Suspension Upgrades

Video.summary: Heavy duty bumpers and rock sliders help protect the Overlanding Toyota 4Runner on the trails.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 2: Bumper Fabrication

Video.summary: We add a winch, roof top tent, LED lights, and more to our 2016 Toyota 4Runner Overlanding Project.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 3: Necessary Accessories

Video.summary: Our Overlanding 4Runner gets new exhaust and creature comforts to help while exploring the wild.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure

Image.alt: Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure
Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure
Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure

Video.summary: "Dark Matters," Jason Mode's '68 C10, is a subtly modded, powerful truck with killer black and red style.
Video.title: Jason Mode - Dark Matters C10

Video.summary: Carcass gives you tips on how to repair rusty trouble spots and remove dents on your project.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech

Video.summary: We head out to the junkyard to source a drivetrain for the 1996 Chevy Silverado.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh

Video.summary: The Silverado gets buttoned up underneath the hood with cooling and power steering installations.

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust

Video.summary: Our '96 Chevy Silverado gets new body parts plus we’ll prep it for paint.

Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again

Video.summary: The Abandoned Chevy Silverado project is back for mild performance upgrades to the engine.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power

Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power

Video.summary: Our 1969 Jeep M715 Project Spartan is getting a frame-up overhaul to look like a truck again.
Video.title: Lighting the Way Forward

Video.summary: With a nod to the Grand National we’re giving our Buick Regal more Go Go.
Video.title: Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal

Image.alt: Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal
Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal

Video.summary: All of the mechanical and electrical systems are getting buttoned up on our '85 Buick Street Regal.
Video.title: Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses

Image.alt: Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses
Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses
Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses

Video.summary: The '85 Buick is ready for some fit and finish with body work and candy paint.

Image.alt: How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint
How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint
How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint

Video.summary: Tommy and Marc give us some tips on painting trim and glass installation.
Video.title: Buick Regal Paint and Trim

Video.summary: We show you a few tips on wiring up your next project.
Video.title: Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing

Image.alt: Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing
Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing
Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing

Video.summary: Street Regal gets an updated custom interior to complement it' custom paint.
Video.title: Street Regal Interior/Payoff

Video.summary: We find a parked Honda Civic and try to get it back on the road.
Video.title: Honda Powered

Video.summary: Our '96 Honda Civic Rally car gets some racing seats for comfort and a rally cage.
Video.title: The Civic Rally Ripper Gets Safety & Seat Upgrades

Image.alt: The Civic Rally Ripper Gets Safety & Seat Upgrades
The Civic Rally Ripper Gets Safety & Seat Upgrades
The Civic Rally Ripper Gets Safety & Seat Upgrades

Video.summary: We do a little wrenching on our Honda 4 cylinder. Updating some key components and sealing up some oil leaks.
Video.title: Adding More Power to the Rally Car’s 4 Cylinder

Image.alt: Adding More Power to the Rally Car’s 4 Cylinder
Adding More Power to the Rally Car’s 4 Cylinder
Adding More Power to the Rally Car’s 4 Cylinder

Video.summary: We add some major power to our 1.6 liter Honda Civic Rally Car.
Video.title: Time to Boost and Tune ’96 Honda Rally Ripper

Image.alt: Time to Boost and Tune ’96 Honda Rally Ripper
Time to Boost and Tune ’96 Honda Rally Ripper
Time to Boost and Tune ’96 Honda Rally Ripper

Video.summary: Our '96 Honda Civic gets some suspension upgrades with some new coil racing shocks.
Video.title: Better Handling Suspension Honda Rally Car Workout

Image.alt: Better Handling Suspension Honda Rally Car Workout
Better Handling Suspension Honda Rally Car Workout
Better Handling Suspension Honda Rally Car Workout

Video.summary: A good find: Marc and Tommy go on the hunt for a certain top-shelf Mopar.
Video.title: Hard Charger

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Dodge Charger needs some sheet metal replaced.
Video.title: Hard Charger: Heavy Metal

Video.summary: Ian tears down and refreshes a junkyard 5.7L Hemi for his '68 military Kaiser Jeep off-road rat rod
Video.title: Lock Jaw: Hemi

Video.summary: Ian wraps up his junkyard military Jeep fabricating a custom stainless exhaust and plumbing the fuel system
Video.title: Lock Jaw: Final Prep

Video.summary: Ian bullet-proofs his rusted out M715 Jeep building the ultimate driver cage using a high tech tubing bender
Video.title: Lock Jaw: Cage Fight

Video.summary: Ian finishes his Kaiser 4WD just in time to baptize the junkyard recovery Jeep on the red rocks of Moab, Utah
Video.title: Lock Jaw: Moab or Bust

Video.summary: In the series launch we take a 1991 Chevy Suburban and transform it into ‘Project Unbreakable.’
Video.title: Project Unbreakable

Video.summary: It’s fabrication time on our Chevy Suburban we’re calling “Unbreakable”.
Video.title: Fab Four

Video.summary: Our GMC “Unbreakable” Suburban gets its new suspension.
Video.title: Suburban Suspension

Video.summary: Our “Unbreakable” Suburban gets its engine and transmission.
Video.title: Unbreakable Nears The Finish

Video.summary: Our Unbreakable Chevy Suburban makes its final preparations for payoff.
Video.title: Unbreakable Readies For The Mountain

Video.summary: The guys put Project Unbreakable, our ’91 Chevy Suburban, to the test at Adventure Off Road Park!
Video.title: The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road

Image.alt: The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road
The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road
The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road

Video.summary: Come along as we take a massive ‘91 GMC Suburban square body and turn it into a lifted off-road beast.
Video.title: An Unbreakable Suburban Transformation

Video.summary: With new wheels and tires and steering upgrade, the guys take their Chevy Suburban for a drive!
Video.title: Unbreakable Suburban Comes To Life

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew cuts a rusty old floor out of a '69 Dodge Charger and replace it.
Video.title: Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe

Image.alt: Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe
Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe
Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe

Video.summary: The time has come to paint Project Hard Charger.
Video.title: Hard Charger…or Midnight Rider?

Video.summary: Work continues on a 1969 Dodge Charger to adapt a Hellcat drivetrain to work in it; Tommy visits OPGI.
Video.title: Hard Charger – Hellcrate Install

Video.summary: The ’69 Dodge Charger gets a new custom exhaust to go with that Hellcrate Engine.
Video.title: Exhausted Hard Charger!

Video.summary: Tommy puts the finishing touches on Project Hard Charger's hood.
Video.title: Charger Hood and Interior

Video.summary: We take Hard Charger to the Mopar Nationals in Ohio to give it a final shakedown.
Video.title: '69 Charger Hellcat Hits the Street

Video.summary: We head to Dallas for the Mecum Auction and run our Hellcat powered Charger across the block.
Video.title: '69 Charger Hellcat Goes to Mecum

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew pick up a late model Cadillac and prep it for some serious speed.
Video.title: Fancy and Fast

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy wrap up their Cadillac CTSV Build with a few final details.
Video.title: Cadillac CTSV- Hammer it Home

Video.summary: We unveil two new project builds, a '56 Chevy and Mopar, at a massive muscle car graveyard.
Video.title: Field of Dreams

Video.summary: We're tearing apart a 1956 Chevrolet 210 to prep it for paint, finding rusty bolts & treasures along the way.
Video.title: Project Shell Shock – Body Moving

Video.summary: We bust rust in their Chevy 210, welding new floor pans and stripping it for paint!
Video.title: Project Shell Shock – Metal Makeover

Video.summary: We're adding new brakes, taillights, power windows, and fresh interior paint to our '56 Chevy 210 Gasser.
Video.title: Project Shell Shock - Brakes, Wiring & More!

Image.alt: Project Shell Shock - Brakes, Wiring & More!
Project Shell Shock - Brakes, Wiring & More!
Project Shell Shock - Brakes, Wiring & More!
